generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinSensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network deployed on the Physical Twin to collect continuous real‑time measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalTwinSensorDataTransmission
]

instance PhysicalTwinSensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinSensorNetwork
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous stream of sensor measurements streamed from the Physical Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, ModelCalibrationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalTwinSensorDataTransmission
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that ingests sensor data to refine CPS and environmental models through calibration algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, MonitoringService
]

instance ModelCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that updates the CAD and dynamic behavior models using refined parameters from calibration."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time simulation of the twin by executing the dynamic behavioral model."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates current state of the twin using sensor data and the dynamic behavioral model."
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the physical twin by comparing model predictions to real data streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes supervisory control actions to maintain safe operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors safety and optimal performance metrics using updated models."
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight, MonitoringAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs predictive analytics to forecast future twin behaviour under current operating conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsForecast
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from the real‑time simulation of the twin."
]

instance EstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on the current state estimation of the twin."
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating a detected fault in the physical twin."
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to correct or adjust the twin configuration in response to detected issues."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into safety and optimality status as evaluated by the monitoring subsystem."
]

instance MonitoringAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action triggered by the monitoring subsystem to address safety or optimality violations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecast of future twin behaviour under current operating conditions derived from predictive analytics."
]

instance CADGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD‑style geometric model containing wheel diameters, chassis profiles, and visual styling of the twin."

]

instance DynamicBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic behavioral model formulated with differential equations to capture motion physics and force interactions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelCalibrationEnabler
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is achieved through continuous calibration: the Twin’s calibration algorithms automatically adjust the model parameters to align with real‑time sensor data, thereby reducing deviation between the simulated and actual system behaviour. The monitoring layer continually verifies that the system remains within specified safety and performance envelopes, effectively serving as an online validation and error detection mechanism. Whenever deviations exceed acceptable thresholds, the system flags abnormalities for corrective action, ensuring ongoing quality assurance of both models and data."
]
